entry.title: Re: #COE KKS01 SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud need of Turkey: Generation of Electronic Delivery IDs BAdI

Can you please double check that you can't find the solution in the SAP Standard localized solution for Turkey here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/9e68f95f727744cf915ee5b38e792aa8/605df7459f68403bb6aaf8b9ac626cc0.html?q=Turkey

 

Looking forward to hearing news from you

Regards,

Axel

entry.title: Re: Wrong KPIs with SAP Marketing Cloud Landing Pages?

entry.title: Re: BTM TMS Transports - SLP_CTS: Error during client creation: Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hi @Fernando,

Sorry something went wrong when I typed before.. 

I have hit the same issue at this moment. I have currently tried with both the URI style of passing CF Org and Space and also the GUID. 
I also tried with both basic auth and OauthPassword. But no luck yet. 

I am attempting now to create it as a technical user as suggested here https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-transport-management/sap-cloud-transport-management/creating-destinations-using-sap-cloud-deployment-service-with-basic-authentication?locale=en-US&q=SAP%20Cloud%20Deployment%20service

Did you have any luck?

entry.title: Re: BTM TMS Transports - SLP_CTS: Error during client creation: Unauthorized
entry.content: Hi @Fernando,

entry.title: Update LFB1 table for field ZTERM(Payment terms)
entry.content:
Dear all, 

In XK02 tcode, i give supplier and Purchase Org, check box Purchasing data and hit enter, going inside, i have to change the Payment terms at Purchase org level, now, requirement is to change the payment terms for all the company codes in LFB1(zterm field) table which are extended to these Purchase org when user click on save in XK02 after changing payment terms at purchase org level.
I identified the exit, EXIT_SAPMF02K_001, but help in finding a way to update LFB1-zterm.

Regards, 

Poornima

entry.title: Re: Wrong KPIs with SAP Marketing Cloud Landing Pages?
entry.content:
Hi all, a short update from my side - We tested it in detail and can confirm that every SAP component tracked 100% the interactions correctly. So we can only look into the direction of the linkedin measures itself. But for now, we can rely on the SAP metrics!

 

fyi - @KunalBansal

entry.title: Digital Skills initiative
entry.content:
My name is Christine, a woman from Kenya.

I have worked in information technology for a few years and have developed an eagerness to attain certification in SAP SuccessFactors. This requires a big budget, especially for me who is a mum and in between jobs.

The opportunity that has been accorded by SAP is incredible, not only to me but for the many who will benefit from free SAP certification.

This certification will provide me with the assurance that I can and will get opportunities to work in implementing SAP SuccessFactors for various companies.

entry.title: Re: Question for SVT Tracking Programs Using 'Initial' op...
entry.content:
Hi Carlos.

Thanks for the comments. 

But do you mean I can even execute RREGCH_VT program back dated after executing Deletion program ?

Ashish

entry.title: CDS view to get date of last change of characteristic
entry.content:
Hello,

Do you see it possible to do something like in following post but in CDS view?

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/last-change-of-a-characteristics-value-from-material-batch/ba-p/13343375

The main challenge for me is that there are no direct/simple relation between tables.

eg. to join MCH1 and INOB I would have to do something like

INOB-OBJEK = MCH1-MATNR & MCH1-CHARG

or in case of INOB and CDHDR

INOB-CUOBJ & 'O' = CDHRD-OBJECTID

What I am trying to achieve is CDS view that would be used in BW extractor on ECC. Of course I can make FM based extractor, but even then it would be time consuming to get this date for every material/batch in the system. I have been going through standard CDS views in HANA, to get some inspiration, but did not find any that join change documents with actual objects. I am in a pickle.

Thank you!

Michal

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
My name is Christine, a woman from Kenya. I have worked in information technology for a few years and have developed an eagerness to attain certification in SAP SuccessFactors. This requires a big budget, especially for me who is a mum and in between jobs.

The opportunity that has been accorded by SAP is incredible, not only to me but for the many who will benefit from free SAP certification.

This certification will provide me with the assurance that I can and will get opportunities to work in implementing SAP SuccessFactors for various companies.

entry.title: Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition type ZNAV
entry.content:
Hi gurus

I have been requested to create some condition tables for tax determination in the creation of POs, I have created them, assigned them to an access sequence and assign this to the custom condition type ZNAV. This condition type has condition class D (taxes), calculation type B (fixed amount) and condition category D (tax). 

One of the condition tables is built with the fields "Destination country" and "Tax classification material", and when I'm trying to create new records in mek1, when I try to enter the value 0 in "tax classification material"  this error comes up: "Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition type ZNAV" (it also happens for other values)

 

Does anyone knows what I am missing?

Thanks,

Álvaro

entry.title: Re: Credit Control Block is displaying as B
entry.content: It was not that helpful.

entry.title: Re: What is the maximum number of Invoice Document Templa...
entry.content:
Hi Swarika, 
You can find the limits here: https://help.sap.com/docs/document-information-extraction/document-information-extraction/technical-constraints

Per Schema you can create up to 1,000 templates.

Best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: The plant discription did not display in MB51 and ME2L (S4 HANA CLOUD)
entry.content: Hi, We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after a few days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions. Kind regards, Tamas

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Dear team,

I have enabled TIH and Growth Portfolio. But I have some questions regarding teams portfolio. I do not find information about what is the functionality of the role-based button.

I understand the proficiency gap button is to highlight the differences between the current proficiency level and the expected proficiency level. But how does the system knows the expected rating?

Also, I read the proficiency gap button only applies for role-based attributes, but what does this mean? Because I do not see any RBP related to attributes except from view/create/edit...

Thank you in advance for your feedback, it will help a lot!

Best Regards,

Sara

entry.title: Re: RCM tax code into SAP B1
entry.content: Indian Localization.

entry.title: Introduction
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I am Sam Cuypers living in Belgium.
I am thrilled to join this vibrant community of passionate SAP professionals, enthusiasts, and learners. My journey with SAP has been empowering and transformative, and I am eager to engage with all of you, share knowledge, and collaborate on innovative ideas. Let's connect, learn from each other and make a difference together in the world of SAP. Looking forward to meaningful discussions and exciting opportunities ahead!

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Great to hear @ginot. 

KBA 3491183 - Current modelID reached limit or maximum number of active jobs [1007] - Troubleshooting Guidelines covers this scenario in greater detail.  Thanks for highlighting.

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: How can I reconcile a partial amount of opening positive balance to an invoice for BP?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have a business partner for which there was an opening balance of 30 Euros. This is a payment we had done for the supplier to keep it on account since we are always purchasing small amounts from them. So basically every invoice issued is of 2 Euros in this case and we need to reconcile each time by deducting 2Euros from the opening balance. 

When I try to reconcile a partial amount of the OB to the invoice the balance instead of showing 0 it shows as -4. It keeps adding instead of deducting. If I try to insert a negative amount in the OB amount to Reconcile it doesnt allow me. 

Can someone help me please?

entry.title: Tracking Landingpage performance from SAP Marketing Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it correct that the performance (views, clicks etc.) of a landingpage (without a form) created and published within SAP Marketing Cloud is not tracked automatically like it is, when using a form itself (=form analytics available)?


Standard documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MARKETING_CLOUD/b88f770e4b7c4ecead5477e7a6c7b8f7/340dc390187e433fb6b03dedfc1c1b93.html?locale=en-US&q=Landing%20page

and the pre-defined reports do not look like a usable options on the question "How many user visited and clicked on my landingpage?"
Is this a bug, by design or do I miss something? (No SAP Analytics Cloud in place)

What is your best practice to approach this?

Many thanks in advance, best regards, Stefan

entry.title: Tolerance Check for Invoice Price Variance Accumulation
entry.content:
Hi,

The standard Tolerance Key (PP) only blocks the invoice if the "Line Item" amount exceeds the tolerance limit. However, there are cases like for invoices with multiple lines, the total variance of all line items exceeded the tolerance limit.

For ex:
Tolerance Limit set in PP = 1000 USD

Invoice Lines:
Item 1 Price Variance = 600 USD
Item 2 Price Variance = 600 USD

Hence, Total variance of Item 1 and 2 = 1200 USD

Currently, both Item 1 and 2 will be posted without block because the variance (600) is under the limit. However, this should be blocked because the total variance (1200) already exceeded the limit.

Is there a way to block an invoice if the Total Amount of Price Variance for the whole invoice exceeded the tolerance limit set in PP Tolerance Key?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Full screen list in Maintenance Views
entry.content: @thomas_mller13 I would also rather have it by standard, but at this point it is what it is.

entry.title: Controlling document number not getting generated while making FI postings
entry.content:
Hi Experts

when we are making postings in FI default CO document number is not getting generated, it was working fine until may 2024, and whatever the posting we have made system is generating only FI and JV document number

We have checked number ranges maintained in KANK for COIN and we have also checked versions periods are unlocked

can you please help us on this to generate CO document number while making FI posting 

Note: we recently had system upgrade from EHP 7 to EHP 8 

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

Dear Ann Paul,

Also please note if you are not able to solve this issue by your own, please open a ticket to CA-WFD-INT.

 

Best Regards,

Balint

Priya

entry.title: Re: How to upload TAN exemption data in BP
entry.content: Use    this   FM   J_1ITAN_EXEM_SAVE

entry.title: Re: Use of table is not permitted error while implementin...
entry.content:
Hi,

I am able to do this by activating the option in ADT.

Right click on the database table which i have created in ADT and select API state option ---change system internally (contract c1) and then activate the use in key user app checkbox.

By doing this you can access the table created in ADT via key user extensibility custom logic app.

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP CAP Multi-tenant App Deployment Failing: CDS not found
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to deploy SAP CAP Multi-tenant application, while deploying the app my app got crashed with error as ERR sh:1:cds:not found.

In package.json file already required dependencies are there.

 

What could be the issue?

Regards,

Syed

entry.title: Open items check at settelment document creation
entry.content: We have a business requirement: when running settlement for condition contracts, the system should check customer open items. If there are any due invoices, the system should not allow the creation of the settlement document.

entry.title: Re: Data Migration Cockpit Date issue for all migration objects
entry.content:
I found the reason described in SAP note - 3210203 - Date type issue in file validation phase when using migration cockpit.

It is apperently duty of excel to correctly convert date and it is therefore excel settings which makes this problem. For my excel, I have converted the field to 'date' format and entered dates as DD/MM/YYYY and then opened the xml template again on notepad. I can see that now it has correctly converted as 'DateTime' in notepad for respective line.

entry.title: Re: 21 Generative AI Jargons Simplified: Part 3 — Foundation Model
entry.content: I am using foundation models for my company's IP and solutions, but I did not find any tutorial from SAP on how to fine-tune the foundation models. Is this feature ready to use? Az* OpenAI has a clear guideline for this on their platform.

entry.content: We are facing issue with View pending workflows quick card in Test instance. if we click view pending workflows quick card in Test instance home page, it will take us to Production data center.

entry.title: Re: How to manage Decimal notation based on User profile...
entry.content: Hi @William_Yu, Thanks for your reply. How to change user preferences. I didn't see any edit option for User Preferences to change Number formatting. Regards, Vasu

entry.title: Blast Off! UI5 Web Components 2.0 is Now Live!
entry.content:
A Journey of Innovation and Growth 

Since the release of UI5 Web Components 1.0 in 2021, our journey has been marked by unwavering innovation and a commitment to excellence. Over the past three years, we have listened to our community, refined our technologies, and expanded our capabilities. Today, we stand at a pivotal moment in our evolution with the launch of UI5 Web Components 2.0. 

Picture 1: UI5 Web Components timeline

The Evolution of UI5 Web Components 

 Our project has continuously evolved, embracing new web standards, eliminating legacy code, and integrating invaluable user feedback from our community to enhance our APIs. This journey culminated in April with the unveiling of the first Release Candidate for UI5 Web Components 2.0.  

 Announcing UI5 Web Components 2.0! 🎉 

Today, we are thrilled to officially launch UI5 Web Components 2.0. This major release signifies our commitment to providing cutting-edge tools for web development. Version 2.0 not only enhances performance and reliability but also sets the stage for future innovations.  

Key Benefits of UI5 Web Components 2.0 

UI5 Web Components 2.0 introduces several substantial improvements: 

  • Embracing New Standards: Future-proofing UI5 Web Components. 
  • Consistent APIs: Streamlined and more intuitive, albeit with some breaking changes. 
  • Elimination of Legacy Code: Reducing footprint and enhancing quality by minimizing bugs.  

Looking ahead, we will adhere to Semantic Versioning and release major updates more frequently to keep pace with technological advancements. 

What's New in UI5 Web Components 2.0? 

Revolutionary Popover API: Experience a standardized, consistent, and flexible mechanism for displaying popover content across all relevant components.  

This API allows popups to display correctly above all other content, eliminating the need for the "static area" used in version 1.x. Previously, popups were placed in a static area within the body to ensure correct positioning despite various CSS rules. In version 2.x, the popover API simplifies the DOM structure by incorporating the popover directly within the component. This results in easier development, maintenance, and enhanced styling capabilities. It also allows components with popups to have physical children, supporting custom content and simplifying testing. The popover API is fully supported by all major browsers. 

Form-Associated Custom Elements: Harness the power of native input behavior within HTML forms. This enhancement makes the features/InputElementsFormSupport.js feature redundant, simplifying form handling and enhancing the developer experience. Refer to the ElementInternals API documentation for more details. 

Seamless Time Zone Support: Seamlessly manage time zones within your applications for a more personalized user experience. The date and time components are adapted to the time zone feature, allowing the components to present dates in different time zones. The time zone identifiers format is the one used in the IANA time zone database. 

New Components: Expand your UI toolkit with new components such as Dynamic Page, Form, Table, Text, Tokenizer, AI Button, AI Prompt Input, Custom Option and Custom Suggestion Item. 

Picture 2: Preview of UI5 Web Components 2.0 new components

Enhanced Existing Components: Benefit from improvements in List Drag and Drop, Tree Drag and Drop, Tab Container Drag and Drop, and a revamped Notifications Experience. 

Picture 3: Preview of UI5 Web Components 2.0 new features

Revamped Documentation Site: Explore our new documentation site featuring a live editor, playground, dark mode, and an intuitive icons view. 

Picture 4: UI5 Web Components 2.0 new website

New logo: We are excited to introduce our new logo and branding, reflecting the modern and dynamic nature of our project. Our new design incorporates defining elements of the feather and the flame. The feather symbolizes being lightweight, while the flame forms a connection to the phoenix, embodying the spirit of rebirth and continuous improvement. 

Explore the Full-Screen Playground: Our new full-screen playground offers a range of features designed to enhance your development experience: 

  • Live code editing 
  • TypeScript support 
  • Code completion for components in HTML 
  • Sample download 
  • Easy sharing 
  • Theming options 
  • Predefined examples 

Picture 5: UI5 Web Components 2.0 full-screen playground

Adoption and Breaking Changes 

UI5 Web Components 2.0 is a major version and introduces breaking changes that may require updates to your code. Our comprehensive Migration Guide will assist you in making a smooth transition from UI5 Web Components v1.x to v2.0. Note: The majority of the breaking changes can be achieved with find and replace.

Notable Breaking Changes:

  • The Belize theme has been removed and is no longer available.

  • CSP (Content Security Policy) will be ensured via the adoptedStyleSheets only, which are CSP-compliant by design.

  • The static area has been removed since the browser now ensures the correct positioning of popups thanks to the popover API that is fully adopted by the UI5 Web Components.

  • The Badge component (ui5-badge) has been renamed to Tag (ui5-tag).

  • The old Table (ui5-table) has been moved to @ui5/webcomponents-compat; new Table is available with better API and accessibility.

  • Public methods for opening popovers are replaced with the open property for declarative APIs.

  • Components like Label, Text, Link, and Title now wrap by default (wrappingType="Normal" by default, wrappingType="None" optionally).

  • SelectMenu and SelectMenuOption components have been removed; standard options with the popover API make them obsolete.

  • Renaming of properties, events, and enumeration values.

  • Removed APIs without alternatives:

    • Progress Indicator (ui5-progress-indicator): Disabled property removed.

    • Select Option (ui5-option): Disabled property removed for UX and accessibility alignment.

    • Token (ui5-token): Readonly property removed; logic now within the Tokenizer.

    • The Device#isIE method has been removed and is no longer available - the IE browser is not supported anymore.

    • Notification List Group (ui5-li-notification-group): The properties showClose, showCounter, priority, the event close and the slot actions are removed due to the new better notification list design concept.

Ongoing Support for Version 1.x 

We will continue to support version 1.x until the end of the year, focusing on bug fixes to ensure continuity for our existing users. 

Get Help and Engage with the Community 

Encountering issues? Reach out for support or report bugs on our GitHub project: Submit a bug or ask a question here. 

Call to Action 

UI5 Web Components 2.0 is a testament to our dedication to innovation, quality, and community engagement. We are particularly excited about the groundbreaking features such as the Popover API, Form-Associated Custom Elements, and seamless time zone support. 

We invite you to preview the new version and migrate to UI5 Web Components 2.0 to fully leverage these advancements. Together, we are entering a new era of web development, and the possibilities are endless. Thank you for being part of this exciting journey with us! 🙌

entry.title: Master Data configurations design PM EAM
entry.content:
Hi team, I'm after some help with master data configurations design plant maintenance module 

Is there any documents or text books that can assist with this please 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: SAP Asset and Service Management
entry.content: Join us in the wonderful city of Porto, Portugal this October for the return of the SAP for Asset and Service Management conference – the only event of its kind in Europe dedicated to the fields of asset performance and service management in a unique SAP-centric context. Over two days, you will learn about the business value of asset and service management solutions from SAP and will hear from a diverse line-up of SAP users from asset and service-centric fields. Discover how they are utilizing next generation technologies to maximize asset efficiency and differentiate in service. This is your opportunity to get more out of your SAP ecosystem, accelerate your business case and business planning, and hear the real-life journeys of those who have been there and done it.

entry.title: Re: showing average of summarized field in cross tab

entry.title: Re: Cloud ready RAP object using legacy BAPI - Clean Core objective
entry.content:
Hi Clemrngt,

Calling BAPI inside SAVE_MODIFIED method will work for all scenarios? Example, I'm calling BAPI which is triggering ROLL BACK statement and goes for runtime error saying BEHAVIOUR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT. Even, if I change or comment Strict in behavior implementation it is giving the same error. Now, the question is, calling BAPI inside SAVE_MODIFIED is right approach for create and update scenario?

Thanks 

Sugumar G

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition Email Notification template setting
entry.content:
Dear @KhaingZinTun,

have a look at this KBA please 3274509 - Emails do not reach the recipients - SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Especially check the DKIM section. 

Either it is not set up, so you need to create a service request (see details in Setting Up Output Management 1LQ - chapter 4.2.7) or the wrong allowed email sender domain is maintained in SSCUI 101313.

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Re: Lineside replenishment SAP WM
entry.content:
Hello @SaleemSk 

Honestly I don't understand your comments, I don't know what you need anymore. The solution I've suggested will post backflush both in WM and IM. Backflushing is automatic posting of components consumption - by definition it's an IM movement. If your storage location is WM managed, then the consumption will also be reflected in WM.

You can't reduce WM stock without simultaneously reducing IM stock, both are integrated. WM movements as such do not change overall stock levels; they only move stock between bins.

You need to be more precise, so I can help you better.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Custom xml file for bank payment in ByD
entry.content: Thanks. Ragulan

entry.title: Mass Product Type update in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are implementing SAP S/4 HANA Public Edition in my company and we've realized there are 80K entries with wrong Product Type. We would like to use a massive way to change this parameter. Is this possible in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud? If so, could you explain the procedure?

Thanks,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Employee Central - Compensation Promotion integration in Successfactors
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I have a question if for this functionality we do need to have a Compensation Module in use (purchased) or we can use it on the EC level?

Thank you

Regards

Wiktoria

entry.title: Re: script events in SA adobe forms
entry.content:
If you want to hide an entire row based on a specific data value you could also introduce a filter via table data binding.

For example if your table rows are currently bound via: $.items[*]
You could introduce a filter like so: $.items.[ATTR=="Value"]
For more information see here: https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-sap/data-binding-with-repeating-items-and-complex-tables-in-print-forms/ba-p/13580752

entry.title: Re: Custom xml file for bank payment in ByD

entry.title: Scheduling for production order not happening
entry.content:

please help in the necessary settings I have maintained Production order scheduling parameters(OPU3).

Thanks 

Raviram

entry.title: call API with Credentials in sap screen personas
entry.content:
I want to open a  api with given user id and password to extract the data  in sap screen personas(public cloud). The link is opened  by using session.utils.Openurl() . The JavaScript methods for api call  with credentials like btoa, fetch, ajax methods not working. pls share some idea for scripting.

 

 

SAP Screen Personas SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition API Management

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeling Extensions & Integration QRC3 2024 Release
entry.content:
Purpose

Greetings SAP Community colleagues!

This blog introduces the latest updates to Modeling Extensions and Integration features within SAP Analytics Cloud, as part of the QRC3 2024 release.

Overview

1. Standard Unit Conversion

Modelers and Planners can now create measures and conversion measures of type Unit, to perform standard unit conversion, such length, weight, height. 

A read-only Standard Unit Conversion table is available in the Conversions tab of the Modeler, to allow for technical reference.

2. Data Export API - Delta Difference

The Data Export API, subscriptions feature has been extended, so modelers and planners can now see the difference between new and old fact data values.

3. Important news regarding Details() formula.

Changes are being made to the Details () formula.  See KBA 3235670 - Details () Formula in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeler is Deprecated

Let’s take a closer look at these features in greater detail.

 

1. Standard Unit Conversion

It is now possible to create a conversion measure of type Unit on models that contain measures, using a Cloud Foundry environment. 

A unit conversion measure will convert source values from the base measure to the specified target units, that belong to the same unit group, using values from the standard unit conversion table. Some examples of unit groups include Length, Density and Weight.

You can also add calculated measures based on the unit conversion, or work with the converted values in your stories and for planning purposes.

The Standard Unit Conversion table is available for reference from the Conversions tab of the Modeller.  

A. Create one, or more unit properties on a dimension. This step is optional and suitable when you wish to apply units to specific members, such as, defining different weight types for different countries.

Figure 1: Unit Properties on a Dimension

B. Enable Unit on the source measure of the Details panel. 

Here the modeler may choose a Fixed unit from the drop down or From Dimension unit property.

 Figure 2: Defining Fixed Unit in km

Figure 3: Defining Units from a Unit Property of a Dimension

C. In the Calculations Workspace, create a Unit Conversion measure.  

Choose the source measure containing the source unit and choose Fixed unit as the target or From Dimension unit property. 

 Figure 4: Create a Unit Conversion Measure

D. Conversion applies to units that belong to the same unit group. 

For units that are not part of the same unit group, no conversion is applied. 

Note that it is still possible to enter a custom unit type in the source or target measure. 

No conversion will take place for custom units that are not present in the Standard Unit Conversion table.

Figure 5: Sample Unit Conversion Measure Showing Minutes to Seconds

Note: The facility to permit the creation or alteration of units within the Standard Unit Table is planned.

 

2. Data Export API  - Delta Difference

Delta is part of the Data Export API, which allows customers to track real-time changes of Fact Data within their models.

This is configured by modelers or planners, from the Data Management workspace of their model, through the creation of subscriptions.

 Figure 6: Subscriptions Feature within a Model

Delta changes are tracked within these subscriptions.  

To date, these delta changes track new records, as they are updated within their model. 

With Delta Difference, the subscriptions feature has been extended, so modelers and planners can now see the difference between their new and old measure values.  

In the screenshot, we see a Cost of 100, the user updates the value to 250, so the delta value is 250.  

Figure 7: Delta Difference Values

For example, cost is 100, the value is updated to 250, therefore the Delta difference is the difference between their new & old measure values, which is 150.

This allows for better alignment with S/4 systems and how delta is notated here.

 

3. Important news regarding the Details() Formula.

The Details() formula is a deprecated feature.

This formula, along with the “Calculated On” column will be completely removed from SAP Analytics Cloud soon, so it is important that modellers and planners replace any formulas within their models containing a Details () formula with an Exception Aggregation using type SUM and Exception Aggregation Dimension using All Members to see the same results. 

To further help with optimizing the performance of these formulas, modellers and planners can choose specific dimensions and dimension properties within the Exception Aggregation Dimension field. 

As part of this phased approach to removing this formula, error messages will soon be seen in the model against formulas containing Details() in the “Calculated On” column.  The following KBA should be followed to help overcome these warning and error messages KBA 3235670 - Details () Formula in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeler is Deprecated

 

Conclusion

In summary, the following new features and updates have been introduced to the Modeling Extensions and Integration areas of SAP Analytics Cloud.

  • It is now possible to create a conversion measure of type Unit, to convert standard units of measurement.  A read-only Standard Unit Conversion table can be referenced from the Conversions tab of the Modeler page in SAC.
  • The Data Export API subscriptions feature has been extended to now compute the difference between new and old fact data values.
  • Changes are being made to the Details () formula.  See KBA 3235670 - Details () Formula in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeler is Deprecated

 

If you have any questions, feel free to comment below or post a question to our SAP Analytics Cloud Questions & Answers forum.

See this SAP Knowledge Base Article if you’d like to learn more about FastTrack and Quarterly Release Cycle releases.

For further information, visit our SAP Analytics Cloud Community pages to find more product information, best practices, and more. 

To find out more about QRC release dates, see SAP Analytics Cloud tenants on Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) updates in 2024.

Check out our SAP Road Map Explorer to see more upcoming features of SAP Analytics Cloud.

Thanks for reading!

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Recife 2024
entry.content: Excelente notícia!

entry.title: Re: Further evolution of MRP apps "Monitor Material Coverage"
entry.content:
Great Post!

Thank you for pointing out those functionalities.

However one question - I have tested the Master Data Issue column on both Public and Private Cloud. On Private Cloud it works fine but on Public Cloud after clicking the link "1 issue" I am not getting the window with number of warnings, errors, and cancellations as shown in your post. I have tested on two Public Cloud systems. Therefore I am not able to navigate directly to the Display MRP Master Data Issues app to display detailed information.

Have you any experience with such behavior?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to use the Maintain Business Role Groups functionality
entry.content:
Hello,

is it possible to assign one business role to multiple business role groups?

Thanks,

Patrik

entry.title: Service Confirmation create as Follow Up of Service Order Item, Conf Status to Completed not working
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am Trying to Create Service Confirmation as a follow Up of Service Order Item through programming.  The Status of the created Service Confirmation should be set to Completed, which is not working. 

If I am Trying to set the Status to Completed manually through UI, it is working. 

I have set the same parameters as it could be seen in the Debug of CRM_ORDER_MAINTAIN but its not working. 

Any Help ? 

BR,

Ketan

entry.title: Re: How to manage Decimal notation based on User profile...
entry.content:
Hi @umasaral Thanks for your reply.

I explored options that you mentioned, but will not fulfil my requirement.

1. Data Input Options - I didn't see any automatic Recognition based on user input data with browser settings. Manual Input Format - I didn't see User can manually specify there own format. If user enters his own format, The formatting overwrites with global setting or KF decimal places in Input template.

2. Localization Settings - These settings apply globally across all users and reports within the SAC tenant. so this is not useful for fulfil individual user requirement.

3. Input Templates - I can see Decimal Places and scale format settings in Styling but no option available to manage commas or dots.

4. User Education and Best Practices - Unfortunately users are looking their individual preferences to enter the data.

Regards, Vasu

entry.title: Where can I start learning SAP Agricultural Contract Management?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Exploring SAP Agricultural Contract Management learning journey learning journey

Overview
Introducing Industry Concepts in Agricultural Origination and Trading, this course provides a comprehensive overview of SAP Agricultural Contract Management. It outlines its main components, supported processes, and master data. Delving deeper, it explores contracts, inventory handling, and fee frameworks within the system. It also covers prepayments, pricing, load data capture, settlement, revenue recognition, and the application process. Lastly, it sheds light on risk reporting in conjunction with SAP Commodity Risk Management, offering a holistic understanding of SAP Agricultural Contract Management.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, you will be equipped with the essential knowledge and skills to navigate the soft commodity business landscape and gain an understanding of the intricacies of the industry. Additionally, you'll delve into the components and functionalities of the SAP Agricultural Contract Management product. By the end of the course, you'll emerge proficient in both the conceptual framework of the soft commodity business and the practical application of SAP Agricultural Contract Management. 

Prerequisites
On the SAP Agricultural Contract Management product page you will find more general information.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge


Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Extracting contactperson (table PA0105, subtype KONP) via 0EMPLOYEE_ATTR in RSA3
entry.content: What is the technical name for the contact person field. Can you see it in table roosfield or structure HRMS_BIW_IO_OCCUPANCY or

entry.title: CPQ SQL Server Version
entry.content:
Microsoft have several remarks on documentation with hints on feature removals, as the below example:

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/t-sql/queries/hints-transact-sql-table?view=sql-server-ver16

Considering this can have impact on CPQ SQL queries being used, what is the current version of the SQL Server and what are the plans to cover this changes?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Content Server- SQLConnect failed - Invalid Command State
entry.content: Thanks Kathleen, I was facing the same issue and it was resolved by changing the UID of database software owner and instance software owner

entry.title: Re: CPQ SQL Server Version
entry.content:
Current version is Microsoft SQL Azure - 12.0.2000.6 2022 Microsoft Corporation. This has the same level of compatibility as the legacy datacenters (MSSQL 2017).

Currently there are no plans to upgrade compatibility level, and when those plans are performed, these type of hints are always checked, along with status of each SQL query before moving.

entry.title: Re: Erro na F110 para fornecedor sem imposto
entry.content:
Olá, 

Esse tipo de erro é bem comum... as vezes é gerado algumas inconsistências nas estruturas de dados do Imposto Retido para alguns parceiros de negócio(customer/vendor). Para ajustar isso você precisa executar o programa RFWT0010 - Adjustment of Withholding Tax Information to Relevant Types.

Há vários Q&As na comunidade sobre isso e a execução desse programa. De qualquer forma segue abaixo mais links úteis para te ajudar em caso de dúvidas sobre esse programa:

Report RFWT0010

1382543 - FAQ: imposto retido na fonte

2544766 - Brazil Withholding Taxes Troubleshooting Guide

BR,

Gabriel Coleti

entry.title: Re: Extracting contactperson (table PA0105, subtype KONP)...
entry.content: What is the technical name for the contact person field. Can you see it in table roosfield or structure HRMS_BIW_IO_OCCUPANCY or

entry.title: Re: Extracting contactperson (table PA0105, subtype KONP)...
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_aii710/7.1/en-US/51/5aae399c1a6651e10000000a114084/content.htm?no_cache=true

entry.title: Auto cancel access request that pending approval at Manager stage
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any option to auto cancel open request that pending approval at Manager stage for more than xx days? I know program GRFNMW_BATCH_STALE_REQUEST can perform the auto cancel function, but it will cancel all open requests at all approval stages. Apart from that, is it possible to send custom e-mail notification to Requestor and Manager upon request auto-cancellation? 

Please help. Thanks.

Regards, Adilah.

entry.title: Re: Can we ignore Data locks for specific Data action.
entry.content:
@Ravinder3 

No You cannot have Data Action specific locking configured. But for your requirement Multi Action would be a good fit. In Multi Action Add a data unlocking step and set it for the region you want to unlock. Then the next step in multi action should be your Data Action which you wan to run on lock period. Then finally add the data lock step and lock the region again. So it will be like below.

 

Unlock--> Run the DA--> Lock Again.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Data migration issue for functional location task list from ECC to S4 2023 through direct transfer
entry.content:
error :

BOM with cat. [..], number [..], node [..] not found for operation [..]

Error Message
 
Message Class:
CM_EAM_TL_API
 
Message Number:
194
 
Found the below Note but not not S4 core 108

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

Fo

entry.title: Re: How can I reconcile a partial amount of opening posit...
entry.content:
Hi,

It looks like the opening balance is in Credit Side, It is the reason you can not reconcile to AP Invoice.

Please check again.

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Re: Can we ignore Data locks for specific Data action.
entry.content: Hello Nikhil,

entry.title: Re: Display XML data for output forms in public cloud for forms displayed using Create Correspondenc
entry.content:
Hello, we are trying to display the xml data for output form that are managed by OPD in SAP public cloud. As we know the code that I shared is helpful to display the xml data if we enter in print queue.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Load method (BAPI/ FM/ IDOC) to migrate Secondary cos...
entry.content:
Hi Yuvaraj,

I would recommend you using BATCHMAN transaction to migrate data, where you can use a batch file to load your data - here some guide on how to do it.

The alternative would be the BAPI's like BAPI_ACC_MANUAL_ALLOC_POST.

I hope this can help.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: Re: Can we ignore Data locks for specific Data action.
entry.content: Hello Nikhil, Thank you for the response.

entry.title: Re: Extracting contactperson (table PA0105, subtype KONP)...
entry.content: Technically it's table PA0105, subtype KONP, field USRID - as far as I can tell in the RSA3 extractor results, it's stated as ZZCONTACTPERS - which would indicate to me that this is most definitely a "own developed" field in our extraction - thus I should maybe get hold of a developer to assist?

entry.title: Re: Set up time in production order
entry.content:
Hi

Instead of using setup time for every material make setup time as zero, base quantity as 2 and machine time as the processing time for units + 2 min 

may be this will give you the results

thanks 

raviram.

entry.title: Unnexed Purchase Orders consume only their net value
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We issue annexed purchase orders.   These POs create commitments in the Budget Control System with their net value only .   Is there a way to take into considerations the annexed value for the AVC check ?

Thanks

Yaacov

entry.title: Re: Mass Product Type update in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @SandraB79 

 

We have the app Change Material Type but unfortunately it's not a mass update app to change the material type , unfortunately one handles 1 material at a time .

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Getting errors while selecting data preview from attribute view.
entry.content:
Hi Dear,

This removed the error message but data not displaying . Please revert i have been working on it since 3 day's.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Extended ECM (xECM) by OpenText- An overview
entry.content: Hi @mfpabon , Every document supported by SF-xECM integration will be stored in the central workspace. You cannot chose to skip storing the document in OpenText once the integration is set up.

entry.title: Re: when performing a Status change in solman 7.2 the err...
entry.content: Hi, I spoke to a specialist and SAP note 3308133 solved my problem, thank you very much for the answer.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data and Analytics Forum 12.-13.11.2024
entry.content:
Hello @Johann 

the sign up link for Option 1 - First Day virtual leads to the Option 2 - 2 days on site registration page (as far as I see it).

Best regards
Axel

entry.title: Schemes - Buy X quantity of material for free on purchase of (A,B,C,D,E) material
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Our customer has a scenario they want to implement in the public cloud.

Offer Details:

  • Purchase 50 tonnes of SKU and receive an additional 10 kg for free.
  • Purchase 75 tonnes of SKU and receive an additional 20 kg for free.
  • Purchase 100 tonnes of SKU and receive an additional 30 kg for free.

Note:

  • This offer applies to a single SKU, for example, Mahakol 20 gm.
  • This offer also applies to a mix of products of the same SKU, such as Mahakol in sizes of 20 gm, 50 gm, 100 gm, 250 gm, 500 gm, and 1 kg. The mix is based on the total weight sold to the distributor. Total of all SKU should be equal to above mentioned weight then above all offers applies.
  • The offer may vary depending on the location.

Thanks and regards,

Vaibhav Ratnaparkhe 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales
